content:
2026-03-20 09:55 — Issues reported:
1. "Show Vertex Dots" does not apply while paused
2. Transition segments/vertices sometimes move across the map from one player to another (buggy)
3. Fills take two full ticks before they fill in - partially fill, settle, wait 1-2 ticks, then fill rest instantly. 100% proves dual geometry sources.
4. Still getting double-filled enclaves
[USER shared annotated screenshot]
2026-03-20 09:59 — Chat log is super thin! Missed 99% of what I wrote. Terrible performance. Use AGENT.md and MCP harness tools.

2026-03-20 10:04 — [USER diagnosed] "You can see the active vertices just group up to the anchors instead of spreading evenly over the frontier to be morphed." Identified that projectOntoPerimeter causes clustering because multiple from vertices project to same point on to boundary. #bug #idea
